title: 007: First Light drops last-minute Denuvo DRM bombshell, leaving pre-order customers and fans furious Bond title risks FPS drops and strict online check-ins, Pirates eagerly await repack as day-one cracks become the norm
summary: IO Interactive's 007: First Light is plagued by Denuvo DRM, frustrating customers and fans. The inclusion of Denuvo DRM has led to performance issues and strict online check-ins. Cracking of Denuvo versions has become a norm, making the DRM's effectiveness questionable.
insight: Denuvo DRM often causes more problems than it solves for gamers.

title: Samsung's $400,000 payout for memory workers sparks revolt as other divisions get only $4,000, fueling intentional production slowdowns internal resentment disrupts packaging operations, major AI chip project decisions to a complete halt
summary: Samsung's memory division workers receive $400,000 payout, sparking revolt and resentment. Other divisions receive only $4,000, leading to intentional production slowdowns and cancelled meetings. Internal tensions halt major AI chip project decisions.
insight: Uneven payouts spark internal conflict and disrupt business operations severely

title: AI cost crisis hits tech giants as employee 'tokenmaxxing' backfires, sparking corporate pullback at Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon agentic AI eats up to 1000x more tokens than standard AI
summary: Agentic AI is consuming excessive resources, draining AI budgets faster than expected. The phenomenon is reminiscent of the Jevons Paradox, where increased efficiency leads to increased consumption. This crisis is affecting tech giants like Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon.
insight: Increased AI efficiency leads to higher resource consumption paradoxically.

title: $100 CPU Shootout: Comparing the Ryzen 5 5500, Core i3-14100F, and Core i3-12100F to find the top DDR4 CPU
summary: In search of the best budget CPU for DDR4 memory, we compare the Ryzen 5 5500, Core i3-14100F, and Core i3-12100F. These three CPUs, all valued around $100, will help you determine which one to choose for your next budget PC build. We'll examine their performance, features, and power consumption.
insight: DDR4 memory upgrade costs can outpace CPU power gains significantly.

title: Micron's Virginia fab begins producing America's most advanced DRAM memory fab expansion to quadruple output, easing DDR4 shortage for automotive and defense sectors
summary: Micron's Virginia fab is increasing DDR4 production to address supply shortages, specifically catering to automotive and defense sectors.
insight: Critical memory supply for critical infrastructure sectors is being bolstered.

title: Huawei develops 122TB SSD with new packaging tech to sidestep US sanctions on 3D NAND chips Chinese firm develops proprietary tech to cram more NAND dies in a smaller footprint
summary: Huawei developed a new packaging tech to bypass US sanctions on 3D NAND chips, allowing the company to increase storage capacity using less dense 3D NAND dies directly mounted on the SSD PCB.
insight: Workaround enables higher capacity storage with less dense 3D NAND dies

title: 768GB of cheap Intel Optane DIMM memory sticks used to run 1-trillion-parameter LLM on a system with a single GPU local Kimi K2.5 install achieved roughly 4 tokens per second
summary: A Redditor successfully ran a 1-trillion parameter LLM on a workstation with Optane PMem DIMMs and a single GPU, achieving 4 tokens per second.
insight: Optane PMem enables massive model training at significantly reduced costs and power consumption.

title: Wi-Fi controlled hacking USB cable stealthily packs in a microcontroller, microSD storage, and more cable executes remote payload execution, keystroke injection, and more, but is 'built for makers, developers, enthusiasts, and cybersecurity learners'
summary: A stealthy USB cable with ESP32-S3 and microSD storage executes hacking payloads remotely.
insight: Empowering makers with accessible hacking tools for cybersecurity education.

title: Valorant anti-cheat update soft-bricks $6,000 cheating hardware, company then trolls cheaters on social media studio tweets 'congrats to the owners of a brand new $6k paperweight'
summary: Riot Games updates Vanguard anti-cheat to block $6,000 DMA devices. The new update effectively bans expensive cheating hardware. This move aims to maintain fair gameplay in Valorant.
insight: High-end cheating devices are now detectable and blocked by Vanguard.

title: OpenTrafficMap ESP32-C5 C-ITS receiver board can help improve traffic efficiency using 802.11p V2X communication
summary: The ESP32-C5 C-ITS receiver board uses 802.11p V2X communication to gather data from nearby vehicles and traffic systems, displaying the results on online maps like OpenTrafficMap, thereby improving traffic efficiency.
insight: Enhancing real-time traffic monitoring for smoother journeys

title: TDK and NHK Spring accused of fixing prices on components used in 97% of hard drives for over a decade
summary: TDK and NHK Spring are accused of price-fixing on hard drive components for over a decade, allegedly affecting nearly 97% of hard drives.
insight: Price-fixing on critical hard drive components could have far-reaching storage implications.

title: Infinity Ward teases the next Call of Duty, calling it "the definitive Modern Warfare"
summary: Infinity Ward teases the next Call of Duty game, calling it 'the definitive Modern Warfare'. The developer plans to unveil the title soon, potentially during a June 2 State of Play presentation. The game's release date and details remain unknown.
insight: Next Call of Duty game promises a definitive Modern Warfare experience.

title: Canada is imposing a 15% tax on streaming services to support local content
summary: Canada is imposing a 15% tax on streaming services to support local content. The tax is an expansion of the Online Streaming Act, which requires major streaming platforms like Netflix to contribute funding toward Canadian content. This move aims to increase the production and availability of Canadian content.
insight: Boosting local content through significant tax contributions from major streaming platforms
